meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Accelerate Your Student SaaS Projects
content.seo_description: Stop wasting time on boilerplate. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your student projects faster. Master production-ready workflows.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from repetitive boilerplate and configuration overhead. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you standardize your architecture, while Claude Code automates the implementation of features. This combination eliminates setup friction, allowing you to focus purely on business logic and accelerating your path from student to professional developer.
content.intro:
You sit down to build your portfolio piece, heart racing with a vision for the next great SaaS, only to spend six hours configuring authentication and database ORMs. The initial spark of creativity dies in a sea of boilerplate code and environment variable errors. This is the silent killer of student innovation.

But what if the scaffolding was invisible? The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural foundation, providing a battle-tested structure so you can skip the setup and start coding the features that actually matter. When paired with the raw intelligence of Claude Code, you don't just write code—you orchestrate it.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational structure of your application to ensure type safety and modularity from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard template with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure the Database Schema
steps.description: Use the template's built-in schema definitions to define your data models without manually writing migrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a User and Project entity schema within the Antigravity database module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply prisma schema updates for User and Project models'

steps.title: Implement Authentication Flows
steps.description: Leverage pre-built auth hooks in the Antigravity template to secure your endpoints in seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement protected routes for the dashboard using the existing Antigravity auth provider.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'secure /dashboard/* routes using the session provider'

steps.title: Connect API Endpoints
steps.description: Connect your frontend to backend logic using the template's standardized API route handler pattern.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route handler for project creation following the Antigravity controller pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a POST controller for project creation with validation'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Finalize your build and deploy to a provider, verifying your production environment variables.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the build configuration and suggest deployment optimizations for Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit build config for production readiness'

pro_tips: Always maintain a clean 'schema.prisma' file; it is the single source of truth for your entire application architecture.
Use Claude Code's '--verbose' flag when debugging complex state issues to see exactly which files are being modified.
Don't build your own UI components; leverage the Antigravity base library to maintain visual consistency across your portfolio.
Create a custom 'prompt.md' file in your root directory to store project-specific context for Claude Code to reference.
Commit after every successful feature implementation to maintain a clear Git history, vital for showcasing your work to recruiters.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, focus on adding a single 'killer feature'—like an AI-powered summary tool—to distinguish your portfolio from the crowd.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your growth. With the right tools, you can build production-grade applications that command attention from employers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
